evals.name: fresh-subagent-launch
evals.prompt: 启动一个新的 Fresh Subagent 来执行 TASK-003: 实现用户登录 API。确保 subagent 以干净的上下文启动。
expectations: Should launch subagent with fresh/clean context
Should assign TASK-003 to the new subagent
Should ensure subagent does not inherit parent conversation context

evals.name: task-completion-verification
evals.prompt: Subagent 声称已完成 TASK-005: 开发前端登录页面。验证任务是否真正完成（包括所有交付物和验收标准）。
expectations: Should verify all expected deliverables exist
Should report a clear pass/fail completion status
